{{Infobox character
| name = Daruman
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|authority over chaos}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, tearing holes to the Void}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|King of Madness, [[Mad King]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, Abidan Executor}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|hero}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, combatant}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Haven]], [[Limit]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[Vesper]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

''See also: [[Daruman Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Daruman was a legendary ruler who unified his [[Iteration]] and established an era of prosperity characterized by wisdom, education, and integrity. He was selected by the second [[Court of Seven]] to serve as one of their first [[Executors]], acting as an agent for the [[Abidan]]. Because he was not bound by the [[Eledari Pact]], he possessed the unique ability to interfere with [[Fate]] and manipulate destiny. He eventually turned against the [[Abidan]], declaring them tyrants and vowing to destroy them. To facilitate this mission, he transformed his original [[Iteration]] into the massive fortress known as [[Tal’gullour]] and relocated to a different world. Often referred to as [[the Mad King]], Daruman is a formidable combatant capable of challenging world-eating entities even in his mortal state. He possesses the ability to bend [[Fate]] to his will, allowing him to project and shape various futures. Within him resides a Class One [[Fiend]] named [[Oth’kimeth]], a demonic entity with a bone crown that can manifest outside of his body. Despite this internal presence, Daruman has demonstrated the ability to maintain self-control and utilize the [[Fiend]]'s chaotic power for his own purposes. He wields a [[sword]] capable of fighting [[Judges]] and has engaged in high-stakes combat with figures such as [[Ozriel]]. His authority is so absolute that his fortress, [[Tal’gullour]], is saturated with his power, and he has used the structure to weather significant attacks.}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Once a celebrated hero, Daruman eventually descended into madness to become [[the Mad King]]. Known as the [[King]] of Madness, he commands authority over chaos and fights using [[Ozriel’s Scythe]]. His appearance is defined by a bone helmet, a fur cloak, and yellowed armor carved from the physical bones of [[Oth’kimeth]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]] uses a Scythe.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]] has authority over chaos.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]]'s armor is carved from the bones of [[Oth’kimeth]]’s physical body.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]] is known as the [[King]] of Madness.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]] wears a bone helmet and yellowed armor with a fur cloak.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]] wields [[Ozriel’s Scythe]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]] was once the hero who became [[the Mad King]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Once considered the greatest of the [[Abidan]] [[Executors]], Daruman possesses distinct red-sun eyes. Having previously been capable of tearing holes into the Void, they managed to break out of the depths of [[Haven]]. While drifting toward the central planet of [[Limit]], Daruman began to speak.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Daruman]] was once the greatest of the [[Abidan]] [[Executors]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Daruman]] has red-sun eyes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Daruman]] was capable of tearing holes to the Void long ago.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Daruman]] had broken out of the depths of [[Haven]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Daruman]] spoke as they drifted toward the central planet of [[Limit]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Daruman]] told [[Gerravon]] that [[Ozriel]] was weak.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozriel]]'s actions were intended to narrow down [[Daruman]]’s choices.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Daruman]] has servitors inhabiting his chambers.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Clad in armor of yellowed bone, Daruman responded to the call of [[Ozriel]]. During his conflict with [[Ozriel]], he placed a lockdown on the [[Sector]] and was expected to emerge from [[Vesper]] as the victor. In battle, Daruman successfully destroyed [[Ozriel]]'s [[Mantle]] and utilized gold circles anchored by a fortress to weather an attack from [[the Mad King]]. Following these events, it is suggested that he may have traveled to [[Cradle]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Daruman]] wears armor of yellowed bone.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Daruman]] is a character who responded to [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Daruman]] put a lockdown on the [[Sector]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Daruman]] is expected to emerge from [[Vesper]] victorious in his battle with [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Daruman]] is a combatant who destroyed [[Ozriel]]'s [[Mantle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Daruman]] weathered the attack from [[the Mad King]] using gold circles anchored by a fortress.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Daruman]] may have come to [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“So Daruman told you I was weak, did you?”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Suriel would eventually be replaced,” Daruman responded.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
